The Group

Day 1 · Tuesday · April 14

Arrival & Golden Hour

✈️ Arrival Day
10:35 AM

Land in Palm Springs ✈️

Group arrival — all 9 together. Rental cars + grocery run for water & electrolytes.

🚗 ~20 min drive to lunch
12:00 PM

Group Lunch 🥗

First meal of the trip — make it count.

Farm Tac/Quila
🚗 ~25 min drive to Yucca Valley
2:00 PM

Check In 🏡

Rest, hydrate, sunscreen prep. Seriously — SPF everything.

🚗 ~15 min to West Entrance
3:30 PM

Enter Joshua Tree 🌵

Easy & gorgeous — great intro to the park.

Hidden Valley Barker Dam
🚗 ~20 min drive within park
6:30 PM

Keys View — Golden Hour 🌅

Arrive early to claim your spot. Best panoramic view in the park.

Keys View Overlook
7:20 PM

Sunset 🌇

🚗 ~30 min to dinner
8:30 PM

Group Dinner 🍽️

Early night recommended. Big days ahead!

La Copine Red Dog Saloon
Day 2 · Wednesday · April 15

Explore & Reset

🌄 Morning Hike Window
6:15 AM

Sunrise 🌅

Best hiking is 7–10 AM before the heat hits. By noon, find shade and hydrate — the desert sun is no joke. Save energy for the afternoon trails.

🚗 ~15 min to park entrance
7:30 AM

Enter the Park — Cool Hours 🥾

Best hiking window before the heat kicks in.

8:00 AM

Trail Choice 🥾

Pick your vibe — vote in the group chat the night before.

Ryan Mountain — moderate (3 mi) Skull Rock — easy (1.7 mi) Jumbo Rocks — easy explore
🚗 ~10 min within park
10:30 AM

Arch Rock 🪨

🚗 ~15 min · Pinto Basin Rd
11:30 AM

Cholla Cactus Garden 🌵

Do NOT touch the cholla. Seriously.

🚗 ~10 min to Joshua Tree town
12:30 PM

Lunch in JT Town 🥙

Crossroads Cafe Natural Sisters Cafe
🚗 ~20 min back to hotel
2–5 PM

Hotel Outdoor Pool 💅

Lay out outfits, charge everything, get gorgeous.

Evening

Jon & Emily Arrive 🎉

Casual dinner or optional sunset stop. Full crew assembled.

7:20 PM

Sunset 🌇

🚶 Stay in the park after dark
9:00 PM

Stargazing 🌌

Our hotel has a dedicated stargazing deck — perfect for a low-key night. For a more immersive experience, head into the park where zero light pollution means millions of stars overhead.

Black Rock Canyon Pioneertown
Day 3 · Thursday · April 16

Coachella Bound

🎡 Festival Bound
6:14 AM

Last Desert Sunrise 🌅

8:30 AM

Slow Morning + Coffee ☕

Pack carefully. Don't forget: wristbands, charger, mist fan.

11:00 AM

Check Out 🧳

Leave rooms tidy. Group photo before departure!

🚗 ~25 min to Palm Springs
11:30 AM

Lunch in Palm Springs 🍳

Fuel up — long night ahead.

Workshop Kitchen + Bar Cheeky's
🚗 ~45–60 min to Airbnb
Early Afternoon

Drive to SDR Las Palmas Airbnb 🚗

~45–60 min from Palm Springs.

Evening

Settle In · Pre-Festival Vibes 🎪

Grocery restock, relax, get ready. Weekend starts NOW.

📋 reminders & info

Good to Know

🚗

Getting Around

  • Rental Cars: 1 van + 1 sedan (Tue–Wed), +1 sedan when Jon & Em arrive
  • Designated drivers needed for JT days
  • 🏕️ JT Entrance Fee $35 / vehicle · 7-day pass · split the car Buy ahead at recreation.gov or pay at the gate America the Beautiful pass ($80/yr) also works
🎒

Packing Checklist

  • Electrolyte packets (daily)
  • Comfortable shoes (trails + festival)
  • Bandana / dust mask
  • Reusable water bottle
  • Snacks for park days
  • Allergy meds + Advil
  • Bug spray (for evenings)
📍

Meet-Up Spots

  • Park: Hidden Valley Trailhead parking lot
  • Hotel: Lobby / pool area
  • Festival: Ferris wheel — south side, 6 PM
  • Airbnb: Text group chat on arrival
🎟️

Festival Essentials

  • Wristband — don't leave without it
  • Portable charger + cable
  • Misting fan (non-negotiable)
  • Sunscreen SPF 50+ — reapply every 2 hrs
  • Cash for vendors
  • Light jacket for night — it gets cold!
  • Festival shuttle runs every 15 min from 2 PM
🆘

Emergency Info

  • Group chat: Joshua Tree 🌵
  • Emergency contact: TBD — add before trip
  • Nearest urgent care: Hi-Desert Medical Center, Joshua Tree
  • Park ranger: (760) 367-5500

"Stay golden, darlings." 🌵✨

April 14–16, 2026 · Coachella Valley
